name: drbinary-chat-plugin
description: Local cyber security assistant for PC issue detection, malware analysis, and system scanning

interface.shortDescription: Analyze binaries, malware, system security, and Android kernel CVEs.
interface.longDescription: Deepbits Dr. Binary connects Codex to a remote MCP analysis workspace and adds focused security skills for binary triage, malware investigation, Windows security checks, and Android/AOSP kernel CVE research.
defaultPrompt: Check my Windows system for malware.
